text: Our paper " Kinetics of Stacking-Order Evolution during Heterogeneous Ice Formation " was published in Phys. Rev. Lett .
Our paper " Unveiling the amorphous ice layer during premelting using AFM integrating machine learning " was published in Phys. Rev. X .
Our review paper " Topological physics in quantum critical systems " was published in Physics Reports .
Our paper " Atomic-resolution imaging reveals nucleus-free crystallization in two-dimensional amorphous ice on graphite " was published in Nature Communications .
Our paper " Molecularly resolved mapping of heterogeneous ice nucleation and crystallization pathways using in-situ cryo-TEM " was published in Nature Communications .
Binze Tang gave an oral presentation at the 8th National Conference on Statistical Physics and Complex Systems, Ningbo, China. Congratulations to Binze!
Tiancheng Liang became a Boya Postdoctoral Fellow at Peking University. Congratulations to Tiancheng!
Tiancheng Liang has won Excellent Graduate of Peking University & Beijing (city). Congratulations to Tiancheng!
